kilocode.doc: Free models work without authentication. For access to paid models, create a free Kilo account at https://kilo.ai (no payment required for free tier), grab your API key from https://kilo.ai/settings, set env var KILOCODE_API_KEY in ~/.config/opencode/.env.
kilocode.name: Kilo Code Gateway (authenticated paid + free auto)

airforce.name: Airforce Free
airforce._archived_note: doubao-seed-2-0-pro is Seed 2.0 Pro (predecessor), NOT Seed 2.1 Pro. No Seed 2.1 Pro free access exists.
